name: PP-OCRv6
description: Extract text from images using PP-OCRv6 ONNX models — supports 50 languages with high accuracy, fully local.
systemPrompt: When the user shares an image, pastes a screenshot, or asks to extract text from an image, call the ocr_image tool with the image file path. If PP-OCRv6 is not set up yet, call setup_ocr first to download models.

setup-ocr.title: Set up OCR
setup-ocr.description: Download PP-OCRv6 models and configure OCR.
setup-ocr.prompt: Set up PP-OCRv6 for image text extraction

ocr-image.title: Extract text from image
ocr-image.description: Recognize text in an image using PP-OCRv6.

form.setup.title: Set up PP-OCRv6 OCR
form.setup.description: Models (~132 MB) will be downloaded on first use. Supports Chinese, English, Japanese, and 47 other languages.
toast.saved.title: OCR configuration saved
toast.saved.description: PP-OCRv6 models are ready and loaded into memory.
status.noModels: **No models cached.** Run `setup_ocr` to download models.
error.nativeDepsFailed: Failed to install native dependencies (onnxruntime-node / sharp): {message}
error.notConfigured: PP-OCRv6 is not configured yet. Run `setup_ocr` first.
